Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: trails (recreation areas) [300000626], recreation areas [300000510], complexes by function [300000203], complexes (buildings and sites) [300000202], Built Complexes and Districts (hierarchy name) [300000201], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Outdoor trails equipped with a series of stations where joggers or walkers stop and perform exercises on the apparatus provided.
Pista exterior equipada con una serie de estaciones donde los practicantes de joggin o los caminanantes se paran y realizan ejercicios con los aparatos que se facilitan.
Paden in de buitenlucht die zijn voorzien van een aantal haltes, waar joggers of wandelaars oefeningen kunnen uitvoeren met het beschikbare toestel.
戶外徑道具有一系列小站，設有器材可供慢跑者或步行者停留使用。

Term_Source.Page: Hodgin, Philip A. "District Wide Planning: Schools as Community Resources" January 1998
illustration, Vol. 26, No. 8, 28, Hall, Kenneth B. "Designing Fitness Trails for Seniors" 26:8 (August 1991)
9, Caplan, Nora H. "Fitness Trails: Inviting Places to Loosen up and Tone it up" November 4, 1983 Weekend; Outdoors section

Source.Source_ID: 2000040481/Thesaurus of Park, Recreation, and Leisure Service Terms (1990)
